commands.review_summary:
The PR adds early `media-uri` handling in `loadImageFromRef` and regression tests for loading and missing inbound media-store images.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main detects `media-uri` refs but `loadImageFromRef` treats `media://inbound/...` as a non-absolute path and resolves it under the workspace before `loadWebMedia` can hydrate it. I did not run a live Telegram/Gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real Telegram/Gateway proof; ClawSweeper repair automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's external setup.

target.title: fix(images): resolve media://inbound/ URIs in loadImageFromRef
